scripts.db:clean: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres psql -U pelada -d peladaapp -c "DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS e2e CASCADE;"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run env:down && docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml up -d postgres && sleep 3 && npm run db:clean && npm run env:up && npm run wait-for-backend && (npm run test || (EXIT_CODE=$?; echo 'Test failed, capturing logs...'; docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml logs > test-results/docker-error.log; exit $EXIT_CODE))
